title: cast(interval second value to int or decimal) is wrong (by a factor of 1000), cast(interval month value to decimal or floating point) fails
poc: SELECT f1, cast(f1 as int), cast(f1 as dec(8,3)), cast(f1 as real) FROM INTERVAL_TBL;
SELECT count(f1), sum(f1), cast(sum(f1) as int), cast(sum(f1) as dec(8,3)), cast(sum(f1) as real) FROM INTERVAL_TBL;
SELECT f1, cast(f1 as int) FROM INTERVAL_TBL;
SELECT f1, cast(f1 as dec(3,0)) FROM INTERVAL_TBL;
SELECT f1, cast(f1 as real) FROM INTERVAL_TBL;
key_bug_features: casting interval second or month values to numeric types
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE INTERVAL_TBL_1 (f1 interval second NOT NULL);
SELECT f1, cast(f1 as int), cast(f1 as dec(10,5)), cast(f1 as real) FROM INTERVAL_TBL_1;
CREATE TABLE INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1 interval month CHECK (f1 >= interval '0' month));
